claims.text:
ACCESS CONTROL

Database access is restricted to DBA team members only.
SSH access requires VPN connection and MFA authentication.
Root access is logged and reviewed weekly.

System assumes identity posture: SSH access requires VPN connection and MFA authentication.
System assumes access control: Root access is logged and reviewed weekly.
